case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JOANNE JACKSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED APR-25-2006, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOANNE
